name: Culpeper Baptist Church
description: Come play pickleball at Culpeper Baptist Church in Culpeper, VA! There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Culpeper County Fieldhouse
description: Culpeper County Fieldhouse is a place to play pickleball in Culpeper, VA. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Daily Drop in Rates:  Culpeper County Resident:  $5.00  / Non-County Resident $8.00

name: Culpeper County Parks & Recreation
description: Come play pickleball at Culpeper County Parks & Recreation in Culpeper, VA! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Lakeview Courts
description: Lakeview Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Culpeper, VA. There are 4 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net.

name: Mountain Run Lake Park
description: Mountain Run Lake Park is a place to play pickleball in Culpeper, VA. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: PATH Recreation and Fitness Center
description: PATH Recreation and Fitness Center is a place to play pickleball in Culpeper, VA. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Providence Church
description: Providence Church is a place to play pickleball in Culpeper, VA. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.
